profile: Otherworld Assault (UR); physical multi-hit bruiser who spams a no-cooldown column Feat (3 hits) plus a 6-hit Ultimate, ramps [Blazing Flame] stacks for +SPD and at 10 stacks gains +30% Crit Rate & DEF Pen, then scales hard into Crit, DEF-Ignore, True DMG and %-HP damage while self-sustaining via 20% Lifesteal and applying Cripple/Fear control. Wants Crit, DEF-Ignore, True DMG, repeat-attack/multi-hit DMG amplifiers and Final DMG. Hard anti-synergy with basic-attack mirrors (his kit is Feat/Ultimate/Special, never Basic Attacks) and with pure heal/support/control-resist sticks.

ranking.name: Mars Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: His own themed mirror: extra True DMG on every Feat crit hit, and Mars crits constantly once at 10 Blazing Flame stacks (+30% Crit Rate). Feat hits 3x with no cooldown, so this fires many times per turn; 3-star adds Spirit Armor sustain. BiS from 0-star, stronger at 3.

ranking.name: Royal Awe
ranking.reason: +DMG for repeatedly hitting the same enemy in a turn (up to +42% at 3-star, +60% at 4+). Mars is the textbook repeat-attack hero (3-hit Feat, 4+2-hit Ultimate), so near-permanent uptime of pure damage.

ranking.name: Lucifer
ranking.reason: Current-HP True DMG vs DoT targets; at 3-star it triggers 4x/turn and applies Torment. Mars is multi-hit and a debuffer, so once any DoT lands this becomes huge repeated true damage. A at 0-2, S at 3+.

ranking.name: Firmament
ranking.reason: Flat +12% to +30% Final DMG, anima magnitude, zero conditions. Universally multiplies every physical and true-damage instance Mars throws; safe core slot.

ranking.name: Ada
ranking.reason: +8% to +20% ATK DMG vs debuffed enemies. Mars self-applies Cripple/Fear and runs Debuff Control, so the condition is near-always met; cheap, reliable, all-hits physical amp.

ranking.name: Wukong
ranking.reason: Every attack deals +5% to +20% ATK as True DMG, applied to each of Mars' many hits. Armor-agnostic and scales with his hit volume; excellent no-condition damage.

ranking.name: Alucard
ranking.reason: +Crit Rate and Crit DMG, plus buff-dispel on Crit at 3-star. Mars reliably crits at 10 stacks, so this directly scales his core crit damage; clear keeper for the crit profile.

ranking.name: Horde-Assault
ranking.reason: Large AOE True DMG rider on AOE skills. Mars' Ultimate hits all enemies 2x, so this lands; crit-independent added true damage, capped per single target but strong overall.

ranking.name: Throat-Slitting
ranking.reason: Front-loaded Final DMG that resets on kill. Mars kills fast and his Genesis resets cooldowns on kill, so the reset is reachable; strong burst Final DMG amplifier.

ranking.name: Aurora
ranking.reason: +DEF Ignore. Mars deals Physical DMG and gains DEF Pen at 10 stacks; more penetration directly multiplies his physical hits against tanky foes.

ranking.name: Rose
ranking.reason: Stacking Final DMG per attack; at 3-star the Ultimate/Feat branch grants more per cast. Mars attacks often so it ramps, but the cap (24-28%) and partial basic-attack weighting keep it B-grade.

ranking.name: Wasteward
ranking.reason: Stacking Final DMG per attack/Basic Attack to large totals at high stars. Mars triggers it via his many hits, but the half-basic-attack framing and ramp time make it solid filler, not core.

ranking.name: Isabella
ranking.reason: Flat Final DMG plus a bonus vs shielded enemies. The flat portion always helps; the conditional only when foes carry Shield, so middling overall.

ranking.name: Michael
ranking.reason: Final DMG per Buff on self. Mars carries Blazing Flame and Genesis buffs for partial uptime, but he is not a heavy self-buff stacker, so it rarely caps; decent filler.

ranking.name: Ananke Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: +5% flat Final DMG always applies; the large bonus needs enemies in Damage Share/Transfer, which Mars cannot create himself. Useful baseline, team-dependent upside.

ranking.name: Nuwa Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: +5% Final DMG plus self Damage-Share scaling and debuff blocks. Flat DMG and effect-resist help, but the big payoff needs HIM in Damage Share state (off-kit); baseline filler.

ranking.name: Nyx Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: True DMG rider on passively-triggered AOE skills. Mars' AOE is his active Ultimate, not passive AOE, so the trigger condition is narrow; only partial value.

ranking.name: Gaia Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: HP plus lethal-hit AOE True DMG retaliation; at 3-star adds ATK/DEF stacks. The HP and survivability suit a bruiser with lifesteal, but it is a defensive payload rather than offense scaling.

ranking.name: Arthur
ranking.reason: +DMG vs controlled enemies, up to +25%. Mars applies Fear so it can trigger, but Fear only locks targets below 60% HP, making uptime inconsistent; conditional but on-theme.

ranking.name: Vivi
ranking.reason: Small +Crit Rate (max 5%). Crit matters to Mars, but the epic magnitude is trivial beside Alucard and his own +30%; early filler only.

ranking.name: Aelia
ranking.reason: Small +Crit DMG (max 5%). On-theme but too small to matter once his crit profile is online; minor early filler.

ranking.name: Yin
ranking.reason: Small +Final DMG (max 5%). Right stat, trivial size; strictly worse than Firmament/Throat-Slitting. Early filler.

ranking.name: Mister
ranking.reason: Small flat +ATK (max 5%). Generic and minor; useful only before better DPS mirrors exist.

ranking.name: Kira
ranking.reason: Single-target ATK DMG up. Helps his single-target Ultimate phase only; does nothing for the column Feat or the AOE Ultimate phase. Partial coverage.

ranking.name: Valendine
ranking.reason: Single-Attack DMG scaling with target HP lost. Execute-style and single-target only, so it misses Mars' multi-hit/AOE bulk; marginal.

ranking.name: Luna
ranking.reason: +AOE DMG only. Mars has just one AOE phase (Ultimate's 2 hits); most of his volume is column/single, so coverage is partial; modest.

ranking.name: Lilith
ranking.reason: Single-Skill-Attack True DMG per debuff. Mars runs debuffs, but it triggers only on single-target skill attacks once per turn, while his hallmark is multi-hit/AOE; limited fit.

ranking.name: Ling
ranking.reason: True DMG vs Infected targets. Mars applies no Infect, so this needs a teammate to set up; conditional and off his own kit.

ranking.name: Baleful Omen
ranking.reason: Small flat Final DMG plus Lethal anti-revive. The +5-15% Final DMG is usable, but the headline Lethal utility is niche; weak versus Firmament/Throat-Slitting.

ranking.name: Night Depths
ranking.reason: True DMG ramping as the holder loses HP. Mars lifesteals and stays high HP, so he rarely accrues [Time Seal] stacks; the scaling fights his own sustain.

ranking.name: Hinata Inori
ranking.reason: Huge Crit/Final DMG burst, but only when an ALLY dies. Great crit theme in theory, yet it depends on losing teammates; unreliable for a frontline carry.

ranking.name: Daisy
ranking.reason: Final DMG plus Crit stacks that build only on turns with NO kill. Mars kills fast and resets on kill, so [Hunt] stacks get wiped constantly; anti-synergy with his tempo.

ranking.name: Lincoln
ranking.reason: Crit DMG taken reduction; defensive crit-resist for the holder, no offense for Mars. Off his win condition.

ranking.name: Zhiming
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED (defensive). Mild survivability, no offense; off-role for a damage carry.

ranking.name: Jacob
ranking.reason: Final DMG plus DMG RED that ramps as HP drops. The offense half is welcome, but it wants you at low HP, which fights Mars' lifesteal; weak hybrid for him.

ranking.name: Dark Tide
ranking.reason: HP plus DMG when above enemy HP. The conditional DMG can fit a bruiser, but it is small and the HP focus is off a carry's scaling; minor.

ranking.name: Dracula
ranking.reason: HP plus Healing-Received scaling. Pure sustain; Mars already lifesteals and needs damage scaling, not more raw survivability.

ranking.name: Albert
ranking.reason: Flat HP only. No offense; a tank stat-stick irrelevant to Mars' output.

ranking.name: Frankenstein
ranking.reason: Tiny flat HP. Defensive and small; nothing for a damage carry.

ranking.name: Galos
ranking.reason: Tiny flat DEF. Mars is a low-DEF carry; defensive stick with no synergy.

ranking.name: Frostglow
ranking.reason: Large Final DMG RED (defensive). Strong for a tank, but pure mitigation does nothing for Mars' offense-first role.

ranking.name: Rock Elephant
ranking.reason: Caps incoming burst damage. A tank survivability tool; Mars is a carry and gains little.

ranking.name: Eternal Stand
ranking.reason: Stacking Final DMG RED when attacked. Defensive only; off-role for a damage dealer.

ranking.name: Titan Strength
ranking.reason: ATK/DEF only while carrying a Shield. Mars has no self-shield, so the condition stays unmet; effectively dead for him.

ranking.name: Azmodan
ranking.reason: Bleed-on-being-hit retaliation. Mars neither tanks nor builds around Bleed; almost never relevant.

ranking.name: Sariel
ranking.reason: Infect-on-being-hit retaliation. Off-kit (no Infect synergy) and reactive; negligible for a carry.

ranking.name: Flame Dawn
ranking.reason: One-time self-revive. Survivability insurance, not damage; low value for an offense slot.

ranking.name: Tinplate
ranking.reason: Reflect True DMG off DEF when attacked. Mars has low DEF and is a carry, not a tank; the reflect is negligible.

ranking.name: Adele
ranking.reason: Big Basic Attack DMG plus basic-attack crit. Mars deals damage via Feat/Ultimate/Special and never Basic Attacks, so the entire effect misfires. Anti-synergy.

ranking.name: Scale-Splitting
ranking.reason: True DMG on every Basic Attack with on-Crit bonus. High anima power, but it is gated entirely on Basic Attacks, which Mars never uses; the whole payload is dead for him.

ranking.name: Renais
ranking.reason: Basic Attack DMG plus on-kill Basic Attack. Mars never Basic Attacks, so neither clause functions; the canonical anti-synergy pick for him.

ranking.name: Van Helsing
ranking.reason: Ultimate DMG boost consumed on Ultimate, scaling with Basic Attacks. Mars does not Basic Attack and is not Ultimate-centric; both halves misfire.

ranking.name: Uncle Ying
ranking.reason: +Ultimate DMG only. It ignores his far higher-volume Feat/Special damage; a weak single-phase pick versus flat Final DMG mirrors.

ranking.name: Sherry
ranking.reason: Doubles Bleed application. Mars applies Cripple/Fear, not Bleed, so the effect never fires; dead weight.

ranking.name: Ying Gou
ranking.reason: Doubles Infect application. Mars applies no Infect, so the effect never triggers; dead weight.

ranking.name: Elegy
ranking.reason: On-Crit reduces target Healing Received. Mars crits, but anti-heal is utility with no damage scaling for him; he gains nothing offensively.

ranking.name: Bathory
ranking.reason: +Effect Hit Rate. His Cripple/Fear are kit-defined; a small generic accuracy buff adds almost nothing and zero damage.

ranking.name: Enchantress
ranking.reason: Effect Hit plus Fox Fire control debuff. Control utility off Mars' damage win condition; its True DMG is a target self-DoT, not his scaling.

ranking.name: Theresa
ranking.reason: +Healing done. Mars is not a healer; pure support stat with no use on him.

ranking.name: Raphael
ranking.reason: +Effect Resist Rate. Defensive anti-CC utility, no offense; off-role for a carry.

ranking.name: Heidi
ranking.reason: Boosts single-target Heal skills. Mars has no heal skill to amplify; the effect is inert.

ranking.name: Orpheus
ranking.reason: Turn-start self-heal. Minor sustain he does not need atop lifesteal; no damage value.

ranking.name: Mystic Bull
ranking.reason: Team Shield at battle start. Support utility for allies; provides Mars no personal scaling.

ranking.name: Warding Blessing
ranking.reason: On-death ally Spirit Shield. A support-death payload; nothing for Mars' own offense.

ranking.name: Alluring Gaze
ranking.reason: +Effect Resist Rate (anti-CC). Defensive utility only; no contribution to his damage.

ranking.name: Elbera‘s Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Effect Resist plus heal on buff expiry. Defensive/sustain utility off Mars' damage role; near-zero offense value.

ranking.name: Venus
ranking.reason: DMG-reduction support stat (effect text empty in data). Pure defensive support; nothing for a damage carry.

ranking.name: Garvin
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED (defensive). Strong mitigation for a tank, but pure survivability gives Mars no offensive scaling; off-role for a carry.

ranking.name: Jeanne
ranking.reason: DMG-reduction plus heal plus true-DMG-taken cut, all keyed to a Damage-Share tank role Mars never fills. Pure defensive/support payload with zero personal damage value.
